title: festuca iberica
intro: Festuca iberica, also known as Spanish blue grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula in Europe. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca iberica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Festuca iberica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
